title: Lead Instructional Designer at Amity University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Amity University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
